sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89025" key="prosektuflo/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσεκ-τυφλόω</orth>, <sense id="n89025.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">blind outright besides</tr_>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">τινα</itype> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.176f</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
